title: Alien Parasite Infection

body:
The great mind of the Xenoid loved to destroy worlds one after another, and one day it found Earth...
Fight back against the invaders before it's too late!
The mod adds 6 mobs (Semi Xenoid Human, Xenoid Human, Xenoid Creeper, Xenoid Golem, HIVE MIND STAGE 1, Xenoid Infecter), 3 weapons (Shurikens, scythes, and swords made of Strong Bones), and changes the moon to the Great Mind of the Xenoid!
